name: chamaac-electric-mist
title: Electric Mist
author: Amarnath
description: Renders a configurable electric mist shader with adjustable detail, distortion, and brightness.

changes: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ./lib/utils so the copied closure remains source-local.
Added a native prefers-reduced-motion listener, froze the React Three Fiber frame loop when requested, and marked the decorative output aria-hidden.
Normalized line endings and removed upstream trailing whitespace without changing GLSL or React behavior.
Removed the unrelated Next.js metadata import and constructMetadata helper so the copied cn utility has only its actual component closure.

modifications.change: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ./lib/utils so the copied closure remains source-local. Added a native prefers-reduced-motion listener, froze the React Three Fiber frame loop when requested, and marked the decorative output aria-hidden. Normalized line endings and removed upstream trailing whitespace without changing GLSL or React behavior.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied component installable as a closed source-local registry item while bounding GPU work and respecting reduced-motion preferences.

modifications.change: Removed the unrelated Next.js metadata import and constructMetadata helper so the copied cn utility has only its actual component closure.
modifications.reason: Avoid pulling site-only Next.js metadata and an unrelated SEO helper into standalone shader components.
